---
title: "Q2 Marginal Effects"
format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r setup}
library(tidyverse)
library(modelsummary)
library(gt)
library(DT)

options(scipen = 999)

out_dir <- "outputs/q2_marginaleffects"
table_dir <- file.path(out_dir, "tables")
me_dir <- file.path(out_dir, "marginaleffects")
etwfe_dir <- file.path(out_dir, "etwfe")
diagnostics_dir <- file.path(out_dir, "diagnostics")

required_files <- c(
  file.path(out_dir, "bldg_sfha_q2_dissertation_prepped.rds"),
  file.path(out_dir, "basic_twfe_effective_table.rds"),
  file.path(out_dir, "basic_twfe_prelim_table.rds"),
  file.path(out_dir, "basic_twfe_highff_prelim_table.rds"),
  file.path(etwfe_dir, "etwfe_base_table.rds"),
  file.path(etwfe_dir, "etwfe_triad_table.rds"),
  file.path(out_dir, "q2_main_table.rds"),
  file.path(out_dir, "highff_post_table.rds"),
  file.path(me_dir, "q2_main_marginaleffects_list.rds"),
  file.path(out_dir, "robust_prelim_high_ff_table.rds"),
  file.path(out_dir, "robust_prelim_highff_post_table.rds")
)

missing_files <- required_files[!file.exists(required_files)]

if (length(missing_files) > 0) {
  stop(
    "These saved outputs are missing. Run source('scripts/q2_dissertation_run_all.R') from the project root first:\n",
    paste(missing_files, collapse = "\n")
  )
}

# ========================================================
# LOAD DATA SUMMARIES / MODEL TABLES
# ========================================================

bldg_sfha <- readRDS(
  file.path(out_dir, "bldg_sfha_q2_dissertation_prepped.rds")
)

groups_prelim_long <- readRDS(
  file.path(out_dir, "groups_prelim_long.rds")
)

basic_twfe_effective_table <- readRDS(
  file.path(out_dir, "basic_twfe_effective_table.rds")
)

basic_twfe_prelim_table <- readRDS(
  file.path(out_dir, "basic_twfe_prelim_table.rds")
)

basic_twfe_highff_prelim_table <- readRDS(
  file.path(out_dir, "basic_twfe_highff_prelim_table.rds")
)

etwfe_base_table <- readRDS(
  file.path(etwfe_dir, "etwfe_base_table.rds")
)

etwfe_triad_table <- readRDS(
  file.path(etwfe_dir, "etwfe_triad_table.rds")
)

q2_main_table <- readRDS(
  file.path(out_dir, "q2_main_table.rds")
)

highff_post_table <- readRDS(
  file.path(out_dir, "highff_post_table.rds")
)

robust_prelim_high_ff_table <- readRDS(
  file.path(out_dir, "robust_prelim_high_ff_table.rds")
)

robust_prelim_highff_post_table <- readRDS(
  file.path(out_dir, "robust_prelim_highff_post_table.rds")
)

# ========================================================
# LOAD MARGINAL EFFECTS OUTPUTS
# ========================================================

main_me <- readRDS(
  file.path(me_dir, "q2_main_marginaleffects_list.rds")
)

me_change_type_sequential <- main_me$me_change_type_sequential
me_event_by_change_type <- main_me$me_event_by_change_type
me_never_sfha_event <- main_me$me_never_sfha_event
me_never_prelim_event_by_triad <- main_me$me_never_prelim_event_by_triad
me_all_effective_grid <- main_me$me_all_effective_grid
me_high_ff_post_by_change_type <- main_me$me_high_ff_post_by_change_type
me_highff_post_by_change_type <- main_me$me_highff_post_by_change_type
hyp_highff_post_by_change_type <- main_me$hyp_highff_post_by_change_type
me_highff_post_triad_by_change_type <- main_me$me_highff_post_triad_by_change_type
hyp_highff_post_triad_by_change_type <- main_me$hyp_highff_post_triad_by_change_type
me_highff_post_partial_by_change_type <- main_me$me_highff_post_partial_by_change_type
me_highff_post_grid_by_change_type_triad <- main_me$me_highff_post_grid_by_change_type_triad

# ========================================================
# LOAD DIAGNOSTICS
# ========================================================

read_diag <- function(file_stem) {
  path <- file.path(diagnostics_dir, paste0(file_stem, ".rds"))
  if (file.exists(path)) readRDS(path) else tibble()
}

dropped_terms_basic_twfe_effective <- read_diag("dropped_terms_basic_twfe_effective")
dropped_terms_basic_twfe_prelim <- read_diag("dropped_terms_basic_twfe_prelim")
dropped_terms_basic_twfe_highff_prelim <- read_diag("dropped_terms_basic_twfe_highff_prelim")
dropped_terms_q2_main <- read_diag("dropped_terms_q2_main")
dropped_terms_highff_post <- read_diag("dropped_terms_highff_post")
dropped_terms_robust_prelim_high_ff <- read_diag("dropped_terms_robust_prelim_high_ff")
dropped_terms_robust_prelim_highff_post <- read_diag("dropped_terms_robust_prelim_highff_post")

fmt_me <- function(x) {
  x |>
    as.data.frame() |>
    select(any_of(c(
      "term", "contrast", "change_type", "change_type_prelim", "Triad",
      "high_ff_score", "highff_post", "event", "estimate", "std.error",
      "conf.low", "conf.high", "p.value"
    ))) |>
    mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, 3))) |>
    modelsummary::datasummary_df(output = "gt")
}
```

# Separated Timing and Underlying Risk

This file now loads saved model objects, tables, and marginal effects from scripts rather than estimating the models while rendering the Quarto document. The heavy computations are created by the scripts in the `scripts/` folder and saved under `outputs/q2_marginaleffects/`.

`event == TRUE` for all sales that occurred after First Street released its flood risk data. `high_ff_score == TRUE` for properties with a Flood Factor score of 5 or higher.

# Basic TWFE Models

::: {.panel-tabset}

## Using Effective Map Status

```{r basic-effective}
basic_twfe_effective_table
```

## Using Preliminary Map Status

```{r basic-prelim}
basic_twfe_prelim_table
```

## Combined Indicator & Preliminary SFHA Status

```{r basic-highff-prelim}
basic_twfe_highff_prelim_table
```

:::

# ETWFE Comparisons

These models use the `etwfe` package. The saved outputs below are produced by `scripts/q2_dissertation_02_etwfe_models.R`.

::: {.panel-tabset}

## Base Model

This version does not include SFHA status or Triad in the equation.

```{r etwfe-base}
etwfe_base_table
```

## Regional Heterogeneity

```{r etwfe-triad}
etwfe_triad_table
```

:::

# Question 2

## Table 15: Question 2 Main Model

```{r q2-main-table}
q2_main_table
```

# Main Marginal Effects

::: {.panel-tabset}

## Change Type: Sequential Comparisons

```{r me-change-type-sequential}
fmt_me(me_change_type_sequential)
```

## Post Release by Effective SFHA Change Type

```{r me-event-by-change-type}
fmt_me(me_event_by_change_type)
```

## Never SFHA: Post-Release Effect

This is the targeted contrast from the effective-map model for properties categorized as `Never SFHA`, allowing high and low Flood Factor properties to be represented in the comparison.

```{r me-never-sfha-event}
fmt_me(me_never_sfha_event)
```

## Never Preliminary SFHA: Post-Release Effect by Triad

```{r me-never-prelim-event-by-triad}
fmt_me(me_never_prelim_event_by_triad)
```

## All Effective Map Status Options

```{r me-all-effective-grid}
fmt_me(me_all_effective_grid) 
```

## High Flood Factor Effects by SFHA Change Type and Triad

```{r me-high-ff-change-type-triad}
fmt_me(me_high_ff_post_by_change_type)
```

:::

# Is the High Flood Factor Effect Moderated by SFHA Status?

These outputs estimate whether the estimated effect of high Flood Factor exposure differs across FEMA SFHA status categories.

## HighFF Post Model Table

```{r highff-post-table}
highff_post_table
```

::: {.panel-tabset}

## HighFF Post by Change Type

```{r highff-post-by-change-type}
fmt_me(me_highff_post_by_change_type)
```

## Hypothesis Test: HighFF Post by Change Type

```{r hyp-highff-post-by-change-type}
fmt_me(hyp_highff_post_by_change_type)
```

## HighFF Post × Triad by Change Type

```{r highff-post-triad-by-change-type}
fmt_me(me_highff_post_triad_by_change_type)
```

## Hypothesis Test: HighFF Post × Triad by Change Type

```{r hyp-highff-post-triad-by-change-type}
fmt_me(hyp_highff_post_triad_by_change_type)
```

## Partially Interacted HighFF Post Model

```{r highff-post-partial-by-change-type}
fmt_me(me_highff_post_partial_by_change_type)
```

## HighFF Post Grid by Change Type and Triad

```{r highff-post-grid-change-type-triad}
fmt_me(me_highff_post_grid_by_change_type_triad)
```

:::

# Q2 Robustness Checks

::: {.panel-tabset}

## Preliminary SFHA × High FF × Post by Triad

```{r robust-prelim-high-ff}
robust_prelim_high_ff_table
```

## Preliminary SFHA × HighFF Post by Triad

```{r robust-prelim-highff-post}
robust_prelim_highff_post_table
```

:::

# Diagnostics and Data Checks

::: {.panel-tabset}

## Analysis Data

```{r data-summary}
tibble(
  observations = nrow(bldg_sfha),
  parcels = n_distinct(bldg_sfha$pin),
  pin10s = n_distinct(bldg_sfha$pin10),
  min_sale_year = min(bldg_sfha$sale_year, na.rm = TRUE),
  max_sale_year = max(bldg_sfha$sale_year, na.rm = TRUE),
  post_release_sales = sum(bldg_sfha$event, na.rm = TRUE),
  high_ff_sales = sum(bldg_sfha$high_ff_score, na.rm = TRUE)
) |>
  modelsummary::datasummary_df(output = "gt")
```

## Preliminary Control Groups

```{r prelim-control-groups}
groups_prelim_long |>
  count(group, name = "observations") |>
  arrange(group) |>
  modelsummary::datasummary_df(output = "gt")
```

:::


# Diagnostics: Dropped Terms

These tables show terms removed from the presentation tables because their standard errors were missing or larger than the threshold used in the scripts. In this fixed-effects setup, these terms are usually either not identified within PIN over time or are extremely sparse combinations.

::: {.panel-tabset}

## Basic TWFE: Effective

```{r diag-basic-effective}
fmt_me(dropped_terms_basic_twfe_effective)
```

## Basic TWFE: Preliminary

```{r diag-basic-prelim}
fmt_me(dropped_terms_basic_twfe_prelim)
```

## Basic TWFE: HighFF + Preliminary

```{r diag-basic-highff-prelim}
fmt_me(dropped_terms_basic_twfe_highff_prelim)
```

## Q2 Main Models

```{r diag-q2-main}
fmt_me(dropped_terms_q2_main)
```

## HighFF Post Models

```{r diag-highff-post}
fmt_me(dropped_terms_highff_post)
```

## Robustness: Preliminary + High FF

```{r diag-robust-high-ff}
fmt_me(dropped_terms_robust_prelim_high_ff)
```

## Robustness: Preliminary + HighFF Post

```{r diag-robust-highff-post}
fmt_me(dropped_terms_robust_prelim_highff_post)
```

:::
